잠언 31:1.content: The words of king Lemuel; the revelation which his mother taught him.

잠언 31:2.content: “Oh, my son! Oh, son of my womb! Oh, son of my vows!

잠언 31:3.content: Don’t give your strength to women, nor your ways to that which destroys kings.

잠언 31:4.content: It is not for kings, Lemuel, it is not for kings to drink wine, nor for princes to say, ‘Where is strong drink?’

잠언 31:5.content: lest they drink, and forget the law, and pervert the justice due to anyone who is afflicted.

잠언 31:6.content: Give strong drink to him who is ready to perish, and wine to the bitter in soul.

잠언 31:7.content: Let him drink, and forget his poverty, and remember his misery no more.

잠언 31:8.content: Open your mouth for the mute, in the cause of all who are left desolate.

잠언 31:9.content: Open your mouth, judge righteously, and serve justice to the poor and needy.”

잠언 31:10.content: Who can find a worthy woman? For her price is far above rubies.

잠언 31:11.content: The heart of her husband trusts in her. He shall have no lack of gain.

잠언 31:12.content: She does him good, and not harm, all the days of her life.

잠언 31:13.content: She seeks wool and flax, and works eagerly with her hands.

잠언 31:14.content: She is like the merchant ships. She brings her bread from afar.

잠언 31:15.content: She rises also while it is yet night, gives food to her household, and portions for her servant girls.

잠언 31:16.content: She considers a field, and buys it. With the fruit of her hands, she plants a vineyard.

잠언 31:17.content: She arms her waist with strength, and makes her arms strong.

잠언 31:18.content: She perceives that her merchandise is profitable. Her lamp doesn’t go out by night.

잠언 31:19.content: She lays her hands to the distaff, and her hands hold the spindle.

잠언 31:20.content: She opens her arms to the poor; yes, she extends her hands to the needy.

잠언 31:21.content: She is not afraid of the snow for her household; for all her household are clothed with scarlet.

잠언 31:22.content: She makes for herself carpets of tapestry. Her clothing is fine linen and purple.

잠언 31:23.content: Her husband is respected in the gates, when he sits among the elders of the land.

잠언 31:24.content: She makes linen garments and sells them, and delivers sashes to the merchant.

잠언 31:25.content: Strength and dignity are her clothing. She laughs at the time to come.

잠언 31:26.content: She opens her mouth with wisdom. Kind instruction is on her tongue.

잠언 31:27.content: She looks well to the ways of her household, and doesn’t eat the bread of idleness.

잠언 31:28.content: Her children rise up and call her blessed. Her husband also praises her:

잠언 31:29.content: “Many women do noble things, but you excel them all.”

잠언 31:30.content: Charm is deceitful, and beauty is vain; but a woman who fears Yahweh, she shall be praised.

잠언 31:31.content: Give her of the fruit of her hands! Let her works praise her in the gates!
